---
name: prj-run-regression
description: "Use when running regression tests before commit or after code changes. Trigger words: regression test, prj-run-regression, commit check."
---

# prj-run-regression

## Purpose
Run regression test suite and verify pass/fail status.

## Command
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/prj-run-regression
```

## Full mode
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/prj-run-regression --full
```
